proj-malaria.title: Fort-Liberté Malaria Source Reduction
proj-malaria.summary: Stop malaria at the source. Drain and clean standing water where mosquitoes breed — every site cleared protects your neighbours.
proj-malaria.reward: Bed nets + larvicide for the most-affected blocks

proj-gardens.title: Community Gardens · Huertos
proj-gardens.summary: Grow food and resilience. Tend shared garden beds so families have fresh vegetables and seedlings to share.
proj-gardens.reward: Seeds, tools, and a rainwater barrel for the garden

proj-water.title: Clean Water Together
proj-water.summary: Safe water, every day. Treat household water and keep collection points clean to cut waterborne illness.
proj-water.reward: Ceramic water filters for participating households

proj-waste.title: Neighbourhood Waste Reduction
proj-waste.summary: A cleaner block is a healthier block. Collect, sort, and properly dispose of waste to keep drains and streets clear.
proj-waste.reward: Community bins + a monthly collection pickup

proj-school.title: School Kits for Every Child
proj-school.summary: Keep kids learning. Help children study daily and prepare kits so every child starts the term ready.
proj-school.reward: School kits (notebooks, pens, backpacks) for the cohort
